message:
feat(cx): general SubsetOf via type-level bit ordering (bd-cfiqq)

Replace the limited All-only SubsetOf impl with a general pointwise ≤
relation using sealed::Bit<const V: bool> and sealed::Le. This gives
the compiler full knowledge of the capability lattice — any CapSet can
narrow to any subset without enumerating specific pairs.

Includes 14 unit tests (reflexivity, bottom/top, intermediate narrowing,
transitivity, marker traits, ZST property) and 2 compile_fail doctests
proving that widening is rejected at compile time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
